# design-review

- User entrypoint: `design-review`
- Interactive capture mode: `none`

## Intent

Perform read-only design quality review against completeness, consistency, implementability, and verdict criteria, then return structured findings and context-sensitive next-step recommendations without changing project files.

## Required inputs

- target_design_doc_path

## Workflow steps

- `load_review_inputs` — Read target document, standards context, and related dependency documents. (confirmation: False)
- `evaluate_quality_dimensions` — Apply checklist, consistency, implementability, and cross-system checks. (confirmation: False)
- `issue_verdict` — Produce structured findings and verdict while remaining read-only. (confirmation: False)
- `recommend_next_action` — Provide context-sensitive guidance based on document type and verdict. (confirmation: False)

## Required capabilities

- read
- glob
- grep
- structured_output

## Outputs

- design_review_report
- completeness_score
- verdict_classification
- prioritized_recommendations
